tagline: Custom usage tag character restrictions have been updated.
what_it_does: Custom usage tag character restrictions have been updated. Tag keys and values now cannot contain spaces or /. Tag keys now cannot consist only of .
why_it_matters: This article explains how to use tags to attribute compute usage to specific workspaces, teams, projects, or users to support cost tracking and budgeting.
key_takeaway: Custom usage tag character restrictions have been updated.
